SUGGESTED NEXT STEPS
  1. Block outbound to 203.0.113.55 at the perimeter firewall.
  2. Isolate 10.0.2.100 from the network pending investigation.
  3. Search SIEM for all outbound traffic from 10.0.2.100 to identify lateral movement and data staging.
  4. Acquire memory image from 10.0.2.100. DGA domain generation (xm9qncb3lkxjf.com, nmg5kr6dcjttx.com) indicates an in-memory implant (Cobalt Strike, Sliver, Havoc, or similar). Run volatility/malfind against the image.
  5. Pull full HTTP session logs for 10.0.2.100 → 203.0.113.55. Evasion indicators: high-entropy URI (encoded payload). Decode URI payloads for C2 command content.
